# omni_machine_set (Resource)

Manages an Omni machine set: a group of machines within a cluster that share a role (control plane or workers) and update behavior.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "omni_cluster" "example" {
  name               = "example"
  kubernetes_version = "1.36.2"
  talos_version      = "1.13.5"
}

# Control plane machine set. A cluster may have only one.
resource "omni_machine_set" "control_planes" {
  cluster = omni_cluster.example.name
  role    = "controlplane"
}

# Worker machine set that automatically allocates machines from a machine class.
resource "omni_machine_set" "workers" {
  cluster = omni_cluster.example.name
  role    = "workers"

  update_strategy = {
    type            = "Rolling"
    max_parallelism = 2
  }

  machine_class = {
    name = "my-machine-class"
    size = 3
  }
}

# Extra workers.
resource "omni_machine_set" "extra-workers" {
  name    = "extra-workers"
  cluster = omni_cluster.example.name
  role    = "workers"

  update_strategy = {
    type            = "Rolling"
    max_parallelism = 2
  }

  machine_class = {
    name = "my-machine-class"
    size = 3
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster` (String) The cluster this machine set belongs to. Immutable.
- `role` (String) The role of the machines in this set. One of: controlplane, workers. A cluster may have only one control plane machine set. Immutable.

### Optional

- `bootstrap_spec` (Attributes) Restore the cluster etcd from a backup on bootstrap. Only valid for the control plane machine set. Immutable. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bootstrap_spec))
- `delete_strategy` (Attributes) Strategy used when removing machines from the set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--delete_strategy))
- `machine_class` (Attributes) Automatically allocate machines from a machine class instead of assigning them explicitly with omni_machine_set_node resources. Mutually exclusive with omni_machine_set_node. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--machine_class))
- `name` (String) The machine set ID. Must not be set for control planes. Immutable.
- `update_strategy` (Attributes) Strategy used when updating machine configuration. Defaults to Rolling. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--update_strategy))
- `upgrade_strategy` (Attributes) Strategy used when upgrading Talos on the machines. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--upgrade_strategy))

<a id="nestedatt--bootstrap_spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bootstrap_spec`

Required:

- `cluster_uuid` (String) UUID of the cluster to restore the etcd backup from.
- `snapshot` (String) Name of the etcd backup snapshot to restore from.


<a id="nestedatt--delete_strategy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `delete_strategy`

Required:

- `type` (String) Strategy type. One of: Unset, Rolling.

Optional:

- `max_parallelism` (Number) Maximum number of machines updated in parallel (Rolling strategy only).


<a id="nestedatt--machine_class"></a>
### Nested Schema for `machine_class`

Required:

- `name` (String) The machine class name to allocate machines from.

Optional:

- `allocation_type` (String) Allocation type. One of: Static, Unlimited. Defaults to Static.
- `size` (Number) Number of machines to allocate. Required for Static allocation, ignored for Unlimited.


<a id="nestedatt--update_strategy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `update_strategy`

Required:

- `type` (String) Strategy type. One of: Unset, Rolling.

Optional:

- `max_parallelism` (Number) Maximum number of machines updated in parallel (Rolling strategy only).


<a id="nestedatt--upgrade_strategy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `upgrade_strategy`

Required:

- `type` (String) Strategy type. One of: Unset, Rolling.

Optional:

- `max_parallelism` (Number) Maximum number of machines updated in parallel (Rolling strategy only).
